description_long: This is an ornate, horizontally oriented wall-mounted mirror with an oval reflective surface suspended from a decorative wrought iron bracket. The bracket features elegant scrollwork and a pointed finial on one end, giving it a classic, vintage appearance. The mirror itself hangs from two small hooks attached to the bracket, emphasizing its suspended design. The frame of the mirror is simple and smooth, contrasting with the intricate metalwork above. The overall color is a uniform light gray, suggesting a painted or powder-coated metal finish. This type of mirror is typically found on building exteriors, such as above shop entrances or in urban streetscapes, serving both decorative and functional purposes.
description: An oval mirror suspended from an ornate wrought iron bracket with scrollwork and a pointed finial, finished in light gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval mirror hanging from a decorative scrollwork bracket with a pointed finial on the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the mirror and the depth of the bracket's scrollwork.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the oval mirror and the symmetrical design of the bracket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the mirror's slimness and the bracket's attachment points.
attribute_frame_design: Oval mirror with a simple, smooth frame suspended from an ornate, scrollwork metal bracket with a pointed finial, all in light gray.
attribute_placement_location: entryway, commercial space, urban street facade
